narrative:
Sagamore Hills Twp F (precinct in Summit County) has 881 registered voters, with 48.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.9%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.6 percentage points.
